About

I'm a passionate pre-final year Electronics and Communication Engineering student who loves turning ideas into real, working solutions. I enjoy building projects, exploring web development, and experimenting with both software and hardware tools. I learn fast, collaborate well, and thrive in environments where I can solve problems creatively. I'm now looking for an internship where I can contribute meaningful work while expanding my skills in development, innovation, and technology.

Projects

Movie Recommendation System Using Flask

Web Application · Python / Flask

A web-based movie recommendation platform that helps users discover similar movies based on a selected title. It surfaces movie details, ratings, genres, posters, and OTT platform availability, delivering personalized recommendations through a responsive, user-friendly interface.

Salem Steel Plant — SAIL

Centralised Electrical Maintenance · 03/01/2026 – 09/01/2026 · 7 days

Completed an internship at the Steel Authority of India Limited (SAIL), Salem Steel Plant, gaining exposure to industrial engineering practices. Acquired practical knowledge of steel manufacturing, Hot Rolling Mill operations, instrumentation, electrical maintenance, and industrial communication systems — strengthening my technical understanding of real-world engineering processes.
